evidence: TASK-046 verified end-to-end; closes FGAP-066. update --dryRun's catalog-ahead arm predicts the precise per-schema outcome via the new pure-read helper simulateResyncOutcome (index.ts, adjacent to computeWouldRegisterMigrations): same/unreadable version -> resynced; no catalog chain -> blocked; version bump + chain + no items -> migrated; in-memory forward-migrate (own createRegistry seeded from substrate decls + the catalog chain, migrationFnFor, runMigrations) + AJV validate against the catalog schema object -> migrated on pass, blocked on throw with migrationsRegistered [] (the live rollback truth) and the ValidationError errors captured but not plumbed (the TASK-048 seam). The dry branch dispatches buckets from the helper inside the existing per-asset tolerance (helper failure falls back to resynced + no decls). resyncSchema, the live arm, and UpdateResult are byte-unchanged; the helper never writes and never touches the cached substrate registry. Runtime demo (throwaway substrates): the R-0012 reproduction now yields dry==live blocked + migrationsRegistered [] with every file byte-unchanged after dry (probe re-verified with full-tree sha256); the valid-item variant yields dry==live migrated + the 1.0.0->1.0.1 decl. Tests: a four-case dry==live parity describe (blocked/validation-fail with the [] no-leak criterion; migrated/populated; same-version resynced + version-bump-no-items migrated; no-chain blocked) plus the extended FGAP-050 dry test asserting the migrated bucket; the dry no-write invariant test routes through the new helper path and stays green; fixture seeds config.substrate_id so the live populated-block migrate stamps (test-harness only). build + check + full test fail 0; parity-check exit 0. Fresh adversarial probe PASS: arm-fidelity verified 1:1 including the unreadable-block-treated-populated, block-version-equals-catalog, broken-mid-chain, and non-ValidationError-throw edges; one MINOR finding (three READMEs carried the old would-act dryRun wording) fixed at the five enumerated locations and re-audited to zero stale occurrences. Op description/promptSnippet corrected; SKILL.md regenerated; CHANGELOG entries filed.
